table.sql:
UPDATE REG_DETALLES SET total_detalle = (round( (total_detalle + ((total_detalle * '[__aumento__]') / 100)) / 50, 0) * 50), iva_detalle = ((total_detalle - (total_detalle / (concat('1.', LPAD((alicuota_iva * 10),3,0)))))), neto_detalle = (total_detalle - iva_detalle), precio_venta = (total_detalle - iva_detalle) WHERE regmovim_id = '[__id_regmovim__]';
UPDATE REG_MOVIMIENTOS SET neto_movimiento = (select sum(neto_detalle) from REG_DETALLES WHERE regmovim_id = '[__id_regmovim__]'), importe_iva = (select sum(iva_detalle) from REG_DETALLES WHERE regmovim_id = '[__id_regmovim__]'), importe_movimiento = (select sum(total_detalle) from REG_DETALLES WHERE regmovim_id = '[__id_regmovim__]'), fpv_movimiento = '[__fecha__]', pun_movimiento = '[__importe_movimiento__]', rec_movimiento = '[__aumento__]' WHERE id_regmovim = '[__id_regmovim__]';
